_patch_meta.description: C10 DimReview R125 purity — 20 group dimension assignments + registry stamp + 1 SD pointer. 10 dimension changes from automated labels; 1 UNCLASSIFIED assigned. Manual application required.

operations.description: 1062-001 G0047 hagneia (moral and relational purity as inner character) — Moral Character / HUMAN. Automated label confirmed.
1063-001 H2889 tahor (purity of heart before God) — Moral Character / HUMAN. Automated label confirmed.

1063-002 H2889 tahor (fear of the Lord is clean — Psa 19:9) — Relational Disposition / HUMAN. CHANGED from Emotion-Negative: fear of the Lord as pure inner orientation toward God. QA-REVIEW flag resolved.

1063-003 H2889 tahor (divine sprinkling — you shall be clean, Eze 36:25) — Transformation / HUMAN. CHANGED from Divine-Human Correspondence: unilateral divine act; no structural mirroring of both poles.

1063-004 H2889 tahor (ritual cleanness as prerequisite for worship access) — Dependence/Creatureliness / HUMAN. CHANGED from Vitality/Existence: covenantal access conditions name the creature's constitutive dependence on God's requirements.
1064-001 G0054 hagnotēs (purity as inner character in ministry) — Moral Character / HUMAN. Automated label confirmed.
6053-001 G0053 hagnos (morally pure inner character) — Moral Character / HUMAN. Automated label confirmed.

6053-002 G0053 hagnos (pure virgin to Christ — covenantal fidelity and orientation) — Relational Disposition / HUMAN. CHANGED from Moral Character: orientation-toward-Christ is the defining characteristic.
6054-001 G0048 hagnizō (inner purification through obedience and hope) — Transformation / HUMAN. Automated label confirmed.

6054-002 G0048 hagnizō (ritual purification as preparation for sacred participation) — Dependence/Creatureliness / HUMAN. CHANGED from Transformation: ritual access preparation is creaturely dependence, not inner transformation.
6055-001 G0049 hagnismos (structured purification process as covenantal pathway) — Dependence/Creatureliness / HUMAN. CHANGED from Transformation: same reasoning as 6054-002.
6056-001 G0055 hagnōs (pure motivation as inner disposition) — Moral Character / HUMAN. ROOT_INFERRED → CLAUDE_AI.
6057-001 H2891 taher (purification from sin through divine cleansing) — Transformation / HUMAN. Automated label confirmed.
6057-002 H2891 taher (ritual cleansing enabling restored community participation — 2Ki 5:10) — Dependence/Creatureliness / HUMAN. Was UNCLASSIFIED — assigned.

6057-003 H2891 taher (God purifies sons of Levi like gold — Mal 3:3) — Transformation / GOD. CHANGED from Vitality/Existence: divine purifying action directed at persons is transformation. GOD as dominant subject.
6058-001 H2893 tohorah (prescribed purification procedure — Lev 14:2) — Dependence/Creatureliness / HUMAN. CHANGED from Transformation: covenantal access pathway is creaturely dependence.

6058-002 H2893 tohorah (setting heart to seek God even where cleanness requirements imperfectly met — 2Ch 30:19) — Relational Disposition / HUMAN. CHANGED from Transformation: heart-orientation toward God is the primary inner-being content.
6059-001 H2892A tohar (ritual purification period post-partum — Lev 12:4) — Dependence/Creatureliness / HUMAN. CHANGED from Transformation: ritual covenantal condition governing access.
6060-001 H2890 tehor (God's purer eyes than to see evil — Hab 1:13) — Moral Character / GOD. Automated label confirmed; dominant_subject set.
6061-001 H2892B tohar (post-partum purification period — Lev 12:4) — Dependence/Creatureliness / HUMAN. CHANGED from Transformation: ritual covenantal condition, same as 6059-001.

record.description: R125 (purity) reveals a persistent structural distinction within the concept of purity: (1) Moral Character — purity as inner character quality (stable); (2) Transformation — purification as inner change process; (3) Dependence/Creatureliness — ritual cleanness as creaturely dependence on divinely-specified conditions for access; (4) Relational Disposition — covenantal fidelity and heart-orientation toward God. The ritual-purity vocabulary (Hebrew H2891 taher, H2893 tohorah, H2892 tohar) is almost entirely Dependence/Creatureliness or Transformation — it does not primarily name moral character but covenantal standing and access. The moral-character vocabulary (Greek G0047 hagneia, G0054 hagnotēs, G0053 hagnos) belongs to NT Greek. Session D should explore whether purity/cleanness and moral character are being conflated in popular usage, and whether the OT covenantal-access concept and the NT inner-moral concept represent distinct contributions to the super-concept.

operations.description: SD pointer DIM-125-SD001 — OT ritual purity vs NT moral purity: two distinct inner-being dimensions under one concept.
Registry stamp — R125 purity DimReview Complete.
